3172460.name: Emiru Game
3172460.description: The First Rhythm game in where there is now over 30+ buttons pressed for each note on rhythm first full keyboard rhythm game. Each song will feature songs by Marcus Owen Bell and will have different difficulties leveled, easy, medium, hard, and Emiru mode. The game is in development to be played online competitively with a online leaderboard currently in place.
3172460.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
